intended_use: Bone VCAR is a non-invasive image analysis software package which may be used in conjunction with CT images to aid in the assessment and reporting efficiency of images that include the spine.
intended_use_full: Bone VCAR is a non-invasive image analysis software package which may be used in conjunction with CT images to aid in the assessment and reporting efficiency of images that include the spine.
target_condition: spine imaging in trauma, oncology, and routine body CT exams
ground_truth: Algorithm validation dataset of CT exams; clinical assessment by three board-certified radiologists
other_metrics: Success rate for automatically labeling the spine: >90%
